prompt: A cinematic street food advertisement at night in a rainy city street, shot in a dramatic close-up food photography style with shallow depth of field. In the foreground, a bamboo steamer basket sits on a wet reflective table, filled with exactly 4 plump steamed momos, while a human hand from the right side lifts a fifth momo above the basket. Thick steam rises visibly from the dumplings. To the right front, place a small black bowl of glossy red chili sauce. To the left, include an open yellow takeaway box with the stylized WOW! momo logo printed in black and red, with one momo visible inside. The tabletop is covered with rain droplets, scattered chili flakes, and warm reflections. In the background, show a blurred urban street with car headlights, storefront glow, and falling rain, creating a moody blue-and-amber contrast. Add large distressed bold condensed white typography in the center reading CRAVE THE MOMENT. At the top left, place the WOW! momo logo. Along the left vertical edge, add the words WARM • SOFT • COMFORT in a narrow vertical layout. Across the top background, faintly repeat the atmospheric words HEAT / COMFORT / AGAIN / RAIN. At the bottom center, add a small footer line reading STEAMED MOMOS • SERVED HOT • 2026 EDITION, and place wowmomo.com at the bottom right. Ultra-detailed commercial food ad, photorealistic, high contrast, warm steam against cool rainy night, glossy textures, cinematic lighting, premium brand campaign aesthetic.
